description: Configuration for Rialto POL workflow - receive items and keep in department

work_order_options.description: Available work order types and statuses must be configured in Alma
work_order_options.configuration_path: Configuration > Fulfillment > Physical Fulfillment > Work Order Types

notes: Work order types and statuses must exist in your Alma configuration
When done=false, items stay in department with work order
When done=true, work order completes and item moves to next step
This prevents items from going to 'in transit' status after receiving
